buildCommand: cd ../.. && NX_NO_CLOUD=true NX_DAEMON=false npx nx build playground --skip-nx-cache && rm -rf apps/playground/_site && cp -r dist/apps/playground/browser apps/playground/_site
ignoreCommand: cd ../.. && git diff --quiet HEAD^ HEAD -- apps/playground/ packages/ngx-rive/src/ package.json package-lock.json nx.json tsconfig.base.json vercel.json
